title: Day 60 - Final Video on Flip
html:
Congratulations on reaching day 60 of the course, we hope you enjoyed taking it, as much as we did preparing it. 

The teachers at Akamonkai and the team at Go! Go! Nihon has worked very hard to create lessons, film and edit videos, write and translate materials, as well as acting as community moderators, so we could give you the best online learning experience possible. We would love to hear from you directly if you enjoyed this course and found it useful. 

So for one last video, please let us know what you thought about this course on Flip?  It would be great to hear your feedback using what you've learned in the course so far, to tell us what you liked and show off your new Japanese skills!

Listen to Davide's message and go to our Flip board to leave your video!

Flipgrid password: GGNnek0#

Thank you very much for the time you spent with us over the 60 days of the course and またね！
